red_flags_detected.details: No QR code scanner badge detected
Manufacture date not clearly visible or legible
Expiration date not clearly visible or legible
Inconsistent text rendering - mix of clear and blurry
Pill color appears oversaturated and artificial
Red warning box appears duplicated and misaligned
Blister pack lacks traditional tamper-evident design
License number partially redacted or blacked out

why_its_fake: This medicine package shows multiple critical red flags of counterfeiting: (1) Complete absence of security features like holograms and scanner badges that legitimate pharmaceuticals have; (2) Critical missing information - manufacture and expiration dates are not visible or legible; (3) Visual quality degradation indicating counterfeit production methods; (4) Text rendering inconsistencies suggesting digital manipulation; (5) Packaging anomalies that do not match standard pharmaceutical production.
recommended_action: DO NOT USE. Return to pharmacy/distributor immediately. File report with drug regulatory authority. Consult licensed pharmacist.
safety_note: Counterfeit medicines may contain: no active ingredient, incorrect active ingredient, harmful fillers, toxic substances, or wrong dosage. This poses severe health risks including treatment failure, adverse reactions, and potential mortality.
testing_notes: This sample is used for training the detection model to improve accuracy in identifying counterfeit medicines in the field.
